nasb.text: For we know that the whole creation groans and suffers the pains of childbirth together until now.

esv.text: For we know that the whole creation has been groaning together in the pains of childbirth until now.

cnv.text: 我們知道被造的萬物直到現在都一同在痛苦呻吟。

ccb.text: 我们知道一切受造之物至今都在呻吟，如同经历分娩之痛。

csbs.text: 我们知道，所有被造之物都一同呻吟、同受阵痛，直到如今。
